appliedUpdates.description: Added ANSI/PTTY clack prompt evidence guidance for stable assertion checks in CLI interactive flows.

frictions.description: Interactive @clack/prompts output in pseudo-terminal contains heavy ANSI cursor-control sequences, making raw transcript noisy.
frictions.resolution: Used deterministic key-sequence automation and extracted stable markers (e.g., "Operation cancelled.", "[DRY-RUN] Subagent:") for evidence.
